creator: petef@databits.net
text:
A tool to scrub mime from mailing lists

This is a *very* cool program - see http://scifi.squawk.com/demime.html
for more discussion.

(I became aware of this tool when OpenBSD announced they were going to be
using demime on many of their mailing lists, and wosch@ noted this on -doc
as well).

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
